meta.title: Bjarne Vrijsen
meta.description: Portfolio of Bjarne Vrijsen, frontend developer focused on modern web applications and strong UI.

hero.description: I am passionate about building web applications that are user-friendly, attractive, and accessible.

paragraphs.intro: I am Bjarne Vrijsen, a recent Electronics-ICT graduate from UCLL, specialized in ICT with a strong focus on front-end development and modern web technologies.
paragraphs.study: During my studies, I gained extensive experience with frameworks such as Vue.js and TypeScript, and built multiple projects including applications in .NET MAUI and Kotlin.
paragraphs.career: I am currently looking for a challenging front-end developer role where I can further grow my technical skills and contribute to innovative, user-friendly digital solutions.

wisemen.summary: During my internship at Wisemen, I worked on a project where I developed a web application using Vue.js and TypeScript.

innovoltus.summary:
At Innovoltus I developed an EMS portal in which energy data was visualized via power flows and graphs. 
I also built a complete PWA that allows users to control and monitor their charging stations and smart plugs.

wiselate.title: Wiselate
wiselate.descriptionShort: This is my internship project at Wisemen where I developed a web app to make website translation management easier.

descriptionLong.first: During my internship at Wisemen, I worked on a project where I developed a web application using Vue.js and TypeScript.
descriptionLong.second: The goal of the project was to simplify translation management for websites. We used the GitHub API to retrieve JSON files from an existing project and update or add translations.
descriptionLong.third: I also used Tailwind CSS for styling. For the backend, I used Supabase to manage user data.
descriptionLong.fourth: I used GitHub for version control and Google OAuth for user authentication.

movieApp.title: Movie App
movieApp.descriptionShort: An app I built during my studies in .NET MAUI. It shows an overview of currently popular movies and series.

descriptionLong.first: During my studies, I built a mobile app in .NET MAUI that displays popular movies and series.
descriptionLong.second: The app fetches data from the OMDB API and presents it in a clear list view. Users can open a movie to see more details.
descriptionLong.third: I also used SQLite to store data locally, allowing users to keep using the app without an internet connection.
descriptionLong.fourth: Users can search for movies and series and add them to favorites. Built with .NET MAUI, the app runs on both Android and iOS.

contact.title: Contact
contact.introPrefix: Feel free to send me an email or a message on
contact.introSuffix: if you would like to get in touch.
